item.title: lauriewhitwell: Laurie Whitwell @lauriewhitwell · 3min They couldn't, could they? Somehow Casemiro finds himself unmarked at the far pos
item.description: Laurie Whitwell @lauriewhitwell · 3min They couldn't, could they? Somehow Casemiro finds himself unmarked at the far post to plant a brilliant header past Darlow to a sensational cross by Fernandes. Old Trafford noisy now. #MUFC 3 7 157 9 mil
